subcodes.title: Words to Kathryn Rogers(?) spoken in 1900
subcodes.first_line: Every element in the creation of God exemplifies the beauty and harmony of living, not for ourselves, but for others... It was not given to every star in the heavens to be the first magnitude
subcodes.subjects: @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @goodly deeds; actions, @being a source of light; guidance
